reason: PRD with all requirements: runtime node (R1), cross-node delegation (R2), load balancing (R3), security (R4), service discovery (R5)
A2A remote agent PRD — this task extends A2A protocol to full distributed runtime; must understand existing RemoteAgentRuntime and AgentCard design
Backend architecture: AgentBackend abstraction layer, TaskScheduler delegation, AgentChannel messaging — all are integration points for distributed runtime node
Directory layout for placing new runtime node server, service discovery module, load balancer, and security modules under src/agent/
Error handling patterns for network failures, node unreachable, health check timeouts, TLS handshake errors, and mDNS discovery failures
Quality standards for new distributed runtime modules: TypeBox schemas, const-object enums, err:unknown pattern, build verification
Logging patterns for node discovery events, health check results, load balancing decisions, and failover warnings
Storage patterns for persisting remote node URLs, TLS certificates, API keys, and node configuration
Component patterns for Settings UI node status panel: online/offline indicators, latency display, load meters, add/edit node forms
State management for node discovery results, health status updates, and load info flowing via IPC to renderer
Type safety for new shared types: RuntimeNode, NodeHealth, LoadBalancerConfig, DiscoveryEvent, TLSConfig — all go in src/shared/types.ts
Cross-layer data flow for distributed runtime: agent process (node server) <-> main process (IPC relay) <-> renderer (status panel)
